mapper.sql: id, homework_id, student_id, class_id, content_object_key, content_file_name, submit_time, late_submitted, teacher_remark, score, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into homework_submission ( homework_id, student_id, class_id, content_object_key, content_file_name, submit_time, late_submitted, teacher_remark, score, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{homeworkId}, #{studentId}, #{classId}, #{contentObjectKey}, #{contentFileName}, #{submitTime}, #{lateSubmitted}, #{teacherRemark}, #{score}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select from homework_submission where id = #{id} limit 1
select from homework_submission where homework_id = #{homeworkId} order by submit_time desc, id desc
